title: Admin Manager
description:
Friendly and fun working environment at Shaw Centre, Orchard!

  • Full-time position, 5 working days, Tuesdays and Wednesdays offdays

  • Start time March 2026

  • Administrative duties:

  • Assist Directors and Branch Principal in the overall operational management of the school.

  • Communicate with parents/students/potential students through calls, WhatsApp and email.

  • Assist in the planning and execution for events conducted by the school, or that the school participates in (competitions, examinations, Master Classes, workshops, overseas trips, performances, etc.)

  • Other administrative duties as required.

  • Receptionist duties:

  • Take class attendance as well as related CRM duties.

  • Receive and welcome parents and students.

  • Introduce and promote our school classes to parents.

  • Onboard new students and collection of tuition fees.

  • Manage sales and recording of dancewear products.

  • Maintain stock lists of dancewear products.

  • Manage students who are waiting in reception for class, ensuring orderly entry/exit to dance studios and behaviour in reception.

  • Any ad hoc basis as assigned by superior.

Job Requirements:

  • 1 year of relevant working experience in customer service roles would be advantageous.

  • Service minded with very strong communication skills.

  • Bilingual in English and Mandarin preferred as need to liaise with Mandarin speaking customers.

  • Strong computing knowledge and proficiency in Microsoft Office is a must.

  • Must love children and be comfortable working around them.

  • Possess positive attitude and willing to learn.

Compensation:

  • Salary: $3,300-$4,500 per month

  • CPF + benefits

  • 14 days annual leave

Working Location:

Shaw Centre #03-30/31
1 Scotts Road
Singapore 228208

Working Hours:

  • Mondays 12-8pm

  • Tuesdays offday

  • Wednesdays offday

  • Thursdays 12-8pm

  • Fridays 12-8pm

  • Saturdays 9am-7pm

  • Sundays 9am-7pm

Interested candidates are invited to apply, please send the following to admin@yanballetacademy.com:

  • Updated resume

  • Date of availability

We regret that only shortlisted candidates will be notified.

postedCompany.description: Yan Ballet Academy offer a complete classical ballet program with certification by the world’s most influential dance organisation – Royal Academy of Dance. We complement this with our Elite Program, which focuses on improving the foundational skills of a ballerina and is based on Ms. Yan’s 10 years experience as a leading soloist performer for the Shanghai Ballet Company. Our students have taken top awards and qualified for prestigious competitions like Youth America Grand Prix, Prix de Lausanne and Asian Grand Prix. Graduates of YBA have gone on to renowned professional schools like Elmhurst Ballet School (UK) and Kirov Academy of Ballet (Washington, DC).
postedCompany.name: YAN BALLET CENTRAL PTE. LTD.
